summary:
The primary disadvantage of using a grid in radiography is increased patient exposure due to the necessity of higher mAs to compensate for absorbed scattered radiation. This results in greater overall patient dose without improving exposure time significantly.  

\boxed{\text{A}}

\boxed{\text{A}}. Answer choice: A
